Lucas, I finally made up my mind about this year. I am going to be much more organized.
That sounds great! So what is your main goal?
To pass an advanced English exam. Next month I am signing up for a course.
Nice! When are you starting?
I am starting in April, and I am meeting my study group every Tuesday evening.
You are really organized. Do you have any plans outside of studying?
Yes! I am really looking forward to a trip in the spring. But I had to postpone my move.
That is a smart decision. It sounds like you have a busy year ahead.
This year I am going to be more organized about my plans.
My main goal is to speak English with confidence.
Next month I am signing up for a new course.
I am really looking forward to the year ahead.
I had to postpone my move, but it is the right choice.

This year I decided to make a real plan for my future. My biggest goal is to change careers, so next month I am going to sign up for a design course. I already arranged everything: I am starting classes in April, and I am meeting my new study group every Wednesday evening. The course has a tight deadline for the final project, so I need to be organized. I have an appointment with my manager next week to talk about my hours, because I intend to study in the mornings. I am also looking forward to a short holiday before it all begins. There is a lot ahead, but for the first time in years, I know exactly where I am going.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah! I have some exciting news about my plans. I finally made up my mind: I am moving to Chicago in the summer. I am signing up for a new job there, and I am really looking forward to it. Next week I have an appointment to see an apartment, and I am meeting the landlord on Friday afternoon. I still need to figure out a few things, like the moving date, so I might postpone the trip by a week. Anyway, let us make a plan to have coffee before I go. What are you doing this weekend? Call me back and we can arrange something. Bye!

This year I finally made up my mind to plan the future. First, I wrote down my main goal for English. Then I signed up for an advanced course with a strict deadline. I arranged a study schedule and I am meeting my group every Tuesday. Next month I have an important appointment to figure out the next steps.
